report.summary: Cycle-close v13: +2 pages promoted since v12 (raas-rollup, staking-as-a-service → batch 14). 3 new page.tsx files built (incl. 2 queue items). 481 unique published slugs, 378 with backing page.tsx. 46 TS errors unchanged. Deploy drift now 7 days. Network egress blocked — API checks deferred to prior cycle data.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGE AUDIT: 481 unique published slugs (deduped from ~500 raw entries). 378 have backing page.tsx files, 103 still missing — unchanged gap across /blog, /taxes, /investing/best, /wallets, and /defi-lending sections.

NEW PAGE.TSX FILES: 3 new files since v12 — btcfi-yield-strategies-guide-2026, depin-earning-guide-2026, staking-as-a-service-providers-guide-2026. These are queue items and recently promoted pages getting backing code.

TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files — unchanged from v12. Files: crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > chars), crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (same), structured-data.examples.ts (syntax). Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors.
PUBLISH QUEUE DELTA: 2 items drained since v12 (raas-rollup-as-a-service, staking-as-a-service-providers promoted to batch 14). 2 new items in queue (depin-earning, btcfi-yield-strategies).
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: No commits since Mar 17. Last commit e999560. No code-level changes to introduce regressions.
NETWORK NOTE: Egress blocked this cycle — could not verify live page HTTP status codes. Relying on v12 verified data (homepage 200, H1 confirmed).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Could not reach degen0x.com APIs this cycle. All 6 route statuses carried forward from v12 verified data.
CARRIED FROM v12 — /api/health: healthy, CoinGecko 65ms, cache 45ms, rate limit 1499/1500.

CARRIED FROM v12 — /api/prices: Live BTC/ETH data with sparklines. /api/fear-greed: Value 11 (Extreme Fear). /api/trending: CoinGecko trending coins. /api/market-dominance: BTC 56.36%, ETH 10.35%, total $2.46T.
STILL 404 — /api/market-metrics: Route exists locally (src/app/api/market-metrics/route.ts, 5KB) but is uncommitted. P1 carry-over.
CACHE TTLs: Configured correctly per v12 — prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-dominance 300s.
RATE LIMITING: Still missing on 6 core data routes — P1 carry-over.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOY DRIFT [P0]: 7 days since last code commit (e999560, Mar 17). All Vercel deploys since then are redeploys of same snapshot.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 773 items (+4 from v12 — new report files and page.tsx files). 48 files changed, 4,348 insertions, 3,464 deletions pending.
CRITICAL UNCOMMITTED: published-pages.ts (+166 lines changed), middleware.ts, 20+ new page routes, /api/market-metrics route, smoke tests update.
PRODUCTION GAP: ~160+ pages promoted locally since Mar 17 are invisible to production users and Google crawlers.
EGRESS NOTE: Could not verify Vercel dashboard or live deployment status this cycle. Last verified v12: all builds 'Ready', latest redeploy ~2h prior.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA THIS CYCLE (v13 vs v12): +2 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (raas-rollup-as-a-service, staking-as-a-service-providers → batch 14). 3 new page.tsx files created for queue/new pages. Publish queue rotated: 2 drained, 2 new added.
PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 items remaining — /learn/depin-earning-guide-2026, /learn/btcfi-yield-strategies-guide-2026. Both already have page.tsx backing files built this cycle.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit and deploy. 7-day drift is the #1 blocker. 773 uncommitted items including 160+ promoted pages invisible to users.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix /api/market-metrics 404 by including route in next commit.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files (unescaped > chars in JSX, syntax in structured-data.examples.ts).
ACTION REQUIRED [P2]: Drain final 2 queue items (depin-earning, btcfi-yield-strategies) — page.tsx files already built, just need promotion.
CARRY-OVER: Rate-limit 6 core API routes, build /trading hub page, build /compare/exchanges hub, scaffold 103 missing page.tsx files.
